visuals.title: Set Theory
visuals.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <marker id="arrowhead" markerWidth="10" markerHeight="7" refX="9" refY="3.5" orient="auto">
      <polygon points="0 0, 10 3.5, 0 7" fill="#1565C0"/>
    </marker>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">Set Theory Fundamentals</text>
  
  <!-- Set A -->
  <ellipse cx="150" cy="120" rx="80" ry="60" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" fill="#64B5F6" fill-opacity="0.6" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </ellipse>
  <text x="150" y="125" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="12" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Set A
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Set B -->
  <ellipse cx="270" cy="120" rx="80" ry="60" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" fill="#2196F3" fill-opacity="0.6" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </ellipse>
  <text x="270" y="125" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="12" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Set B
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Intersection -->
  <path d="M180 120 A80 60 0 0 1 240 120 A80 60 0 0 0 180 120 Z" fill="#1565C0" fill-opacity="0.8" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <text x="210" y="120" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" font-weight="bold" opacity="0">
    A ∩ B
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Element in A -->
  <circle cx="120" cy="150" r="5" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <text x="135" cy="150" text-anchor="start" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Element in A
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Element in B -->
  <circle cx="300" cy="150" r="5" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <text x="285" cy="150" text-anchor="end" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Element in B
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Element in Intersection -->
  <circle cx="210" cy="100" r="5" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <text x="225" cy="100" text-anchor="start" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Element in A ∩ B
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Union Label -->
  <text x="210" y="70" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="#1565C0" font-weight="bold" opacity="0">
    A ∪ B (Union)
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Subset Arrow -->
  <line x1="50" y1="220" x2="120" y2="220" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="3.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <text x="85" y="215" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Subset (A ⊆ B)
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Universal Set -->
  <rect x="60" y="250" width="300" height="80" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" stroke-dasharray="5,5" fill="none" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="3.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="245" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Universal Set (U)
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
</svg>
